title: stachys rosea
intro: Stachys rosea, also known as Pink Betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stachys rosea include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Stachys rosea can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
